statement.informal: `electrode_potential` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (standard_potential >= -E0_MAX ∧ standard_potential <=  E0_MAX ∧ n_electrons > 0.0 ∧ n_electrons <= N_MAX ∧ temperature >= T_MIN ∧ temperature <= T_MAX ∧ reaction_quotient > 0.0), the function's result satisfies (True). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
